items.title: Castle Siege Season Finale — Reward Pool Doubled
items.excerpt: The eternal war for the obsidian throne reaches its climax. All winning guilds receive a doubled reward chest.
items.content:
The final Castle Siege of the season takes place this Saturday at 20:00 UTC. We have doubled the reward pool — winning guilds will receive Bound Jewels of Harmony x500, Excellent Ancient sets, and a unique guild title valid until next season.

Make sure your guild is registered no later than Friday 23:59 UTC.

items.title: Patch 1.4.2 — Class Balance & Bug Fixes
items.excerpt: Sorceress nerf, Dark Knight buff, and 27 quality-of-life improvements roll out tonight.
items.content:
Patch notes:
• Sorceress: Evil Spirit damage reduced by 6%.
• Dark Knight: Death Stab cooldown -0.3s.
• Fixed an exploit in Chaos Castle.
• Added gold filter to Ranking page.
• Improved client launcher stability.

items.title: New Map: The Forsaken Cathedral
items.excerpt: A new high-level map opens its gates. Hunt the Wraith King and earn the new Mythic relic set.
items.content: The Forsaken Cathedral is now live for adventurers level 800+. Inside, you will face elite undead and the Wraith King boss every 3 hours. Drops include the brand-new Mythic Relic set and the Crown of Eternia.

items.title: Spring Drop Event — +100% Jewels
items.excerpt: For two weeks, jewel drop rates are doubled across all hunting grounds.
items.content: From April 1 to April 14, all jewel drops (Bless, Soul, Chaos, Life, Creation, Harmony) have doubled drop rates. Stack up before the event ends.
